heading: Repealed. , (2),June 21, 1955, ch. 172, § 5(1)69 Stat. 170
label: 886, 887 Repealed. , (2),June 21, 1955, ch. 172, § 5(1)69 Stat. 170
notes: Section 886, R.S. § 4687, related to employment of officers of Army and Navy in the work of surveying the coast of the United States.

Section 887, R.S. § 4688; acts , ; , , provided for allowance for subsistence to officers of Army and Navy while employed on coast survey service.Aug. 30, 1890, ch. 837, § 126 Stat. 382June 5, 1920, ch. 235, § 141 Stat. 929

Additional RepealSections were also repealed by , . Section 49(a) of act , provided in part that laws effective after , inconsistent with that act, should be considered as superseding it to the extent of the inconsistency.act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 5370A Stat. 641Aug. 10, 1956Mar. 31, 1955
